mapper.select:
WITH RECURSIVE dept_tree AS ( SELECT d.dept_id, d.dept_code, d.dept_name, d.parent_dept_id, d.dept_level, d.sort_order, d.use_yn FROM platform_v3.org_department d WHERE d.use_yn = 'Y'
AND d.dept_id = #{parentDeptId}
AND d.parent_dept_id IS NULL
UNION ALL SELECT c.dept_id, c.dept_code, c.dept_name, c.parent_dept_id, c.dept_level, c.sort_order, c.use_yn FROM platform_v3.org_department c INNER JOIN dept_tree p ON c.parent_dept_id = p.dept_id WHERE c.use_yn = 'Y' ) SELECT dept_id, dept_code, dept_name, parent_dept_id, dept_level, sort_order FROM dept_tree ORDER BY dept_level, sort_order, dept_name

SELECT d.dept_id, d.dept_code, d.dept_name, d.parent_dept_id, d.dept_level, d.sort_order, d.use_yn, p.dept_name AS parent_dept_name, d.created_at, d.updated_at FROM platform_v3.org_department d LEFT JOIN platform_v3.org_department p ON d.parent_dept_id = p.dept_id WHERE d.dept_id = #{deptId}

SELECT e.employee_id, e.employee_no, e.employee_name, e.dept_id, d.dept_name, e.position_id, p.position_name, p.position_level, e.email, e.phone, e.status, e.hire_date FROM platform_v3.org_employee e INNER JOIN platform_v3.org_department d ON e.dept_id = d.dept_id INNER JOIN platform_v3.org_position p ON e.position_id = p.position_id WHERE 1=1 AND e.dept_id = #{deptId}
AND (e.employee_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR e.employee_no LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR e.email LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
AND e.status = #{status} AND e.status = 'ACTIVE'
ORDER BY d.sort_order, p.position_level, e.employee_name

SELECT e.employee_id, e.employee_no, e.employee_name, e.dept_id, d.dept_name, d.dept_code, e.position_id, p.position_name, p.position_code, p.position_level, e.email, e.phone, e.keycloak_user_id, e.hire_date, e.status, e.created_at, e.updated_at FROM platform_v3.org_employee e INNER JOIN platform_v3.org_department d ON e.dept_id = d.dept_id INNER JOIN platform_v3.org_position p ON e.position_id = p.position_id WHERE e.employee_id = #{employeeId}

SELECT e.employee_id, e.employee_no, e.employee_name, d.dept_id, d.dept_name, p.position_id, p.position_name, p.position_level FROM platform_v3.org_employee e INNER JOIN platform_v3.org_department d ON e.dept_id = d.dept_id INNER JOIN platform_v3.org_position p ON e.position_id = p.position_id WHERE e.status = 'ACTIVE'
AND (e.employee_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR d.dept_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR e.employee_no LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
AND e.dept_id = #{deptId} ORDER BY p.position_level, d.sort_order, e.employee_name LIMIT 50

choose.when: SELECT e.employee_id, e.employee_name, d.dept_id, d.dept_name, p.position_name, p.position_level FROM platform_v3.org_employee e INNER JOIN platform_v3.org_department d ON e.dept_id = d.dept_id INNER JOIN platform_v3.org_position p ON e.position_id = p.position_id WHERE e.dept_id = (SELECT dept_id FROM platform_v3.org_employee WHERE employee_id = #{drafterId}) AND e.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY p.position_level ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT e.employee_id, e.employee_name, d.dept_id, d.dept_name, p.position_name, p.position_level FROM platform_v3.org_employee e INNER JOIN platform_v3.org_department d ON e.dept_id = d.dept_id INNER JOIN platform_v3.org_position p ON e.position_id = p.position_id WHERE d.dept_id = ( SELECT COALESCE(d2.parent_dept_id, d2.dept_id) FROM platform_v3.org_department d2 WHERE d2.dept_id = (SELECT dept_id FROM platform_v3.org_employee WHERE employee_id = #{drafterId}) ) AND e.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY p.position_level ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT e.employee_id, e.employee_name, d.dept_id, d.dept_name, p.position_name, p.position_level FROM platform_v3.org_employee e INNER JOIN platform_v3.org_department d ON e.dept_id = d.dept_id INNER JOIN platform_v3.org_position p ON e.position_id = p.position_id WHERE p.position_level = 1 AND e.status = 'ACTIVE' LIMIT 1
choose.otherwise: SELECT NULL AS employee_id WHERE FALSE

mapper.select: SELECT e.employee_id, e.employee_no, e.employee_name, e.dept_id, d.dept_name, d.dept_code, e.position_id, p.position_name, p.position_code, p.position_level, e.email, e.phone, e.keycloak_user_id FROM platform_v3.org_employee e INNER JOIN platform_v3.org_department d ON e.dept_id = d.dept_id INNER JOIN platform_v3.org_position p ON e.position_id = p.position_id WHERE e.keycloak_user_id = #{keycloakUserId} AND e.status = 'ACTIVE' LIMIT 1

SELECT e.employee_id, e.employee_no, e.employee_name, e.dept_id, d.dept_name, d.dept_code, e.position_id, p.position_name, p.position_code, p.position_level, e.email, e.phone, e.keycloak_user_id FROM platform_v3.org_employee e INNER JOIN platform_v3.org_department d ON e.dept_id = d.dept_id INNER JOIN platform_v3.org_position p ON e.position_id = p.position_id WHERE e.employee_no = #{employeeNo} AND e.status = 'ACTIVE' LIMIT 1

SELECT e.employee_id, e.employee_name, d.dept_id, d.dept_name, p.position_name, p.position_level FROM platform_v3.org_employee e INNER JOIN platform_v3.org_department d ON e.dept_id = d.dept_id INNER JOIN platform_v3.org_position p ON e.position_id = p.position_id WHERE e.dept_id = #{deptId} AND e.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY p.position_level ASC LIMIT 1
